name: testmeshai
description: Electron POC for local codebase entity extraction and execution

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch" "tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/electron/main.js && ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.web.json --noEmit
